# Campgrounder

> Campgrounder is a free campground discovery app for iOS covering 351+ campgrounds across North America. It is designed with a Bauhaus-inspired dark interface and provides honest cell signal estimates for every listing.

## What Campgrounder Is

Campgrounder helps campers find their perfect campsite across the United States and Canada. Unlike typical camping apps that feel like spreadsheets, Campgrounder is built around a clean, design-forward experience with deep forest green and burnt orange aesthetics.

The app is free, requires no account, and contains no ads.

## Key Features

- **351+ campgrounds** across the US and Canada including national parks, state parks, BLM land, dispersed camping, glamping, and dark sky sites
- **Honest cell signal data** — every listing includes estimated signal strength for T-Mobile, Verizon, AT&T, and Starlink
- **15 search filters** including pet-friendly, tent-only, waterfront, dark sky, winter access, no generators, and RV hookups
- **Interactive dark map** with all 351 camp pins color-coded by type
- **Save camps** to a personal list across sessions
- **Seasonal open/close info**, pricing, amenities, and directions for every camp

## Camp Categories

- National Parks
- State Parks
- US Forest Service
- BLM (Bureau of Land Management) dispersed camping
- Glamping
- RV Parks
- Dark Sky sites
- Winter camping
- Backcountry
- Canadian campgrounds

## Pricing

Campgrounder is free to download and use. A one-time $6.99 in-app purchase unlocks Campgrounder Pro, which includes unlimited saves, trip lists, notes on saved camps, and offline access.

## Availability

- iOS: Available on the Apple App Store (App ID: 6781063754)
- Android: Coming soon to Google Play
- Web: https://campgrounder.io

## About

Campgrounder was built by Benjamin VanderVeen, a designer and founder based in the United States, as a response to the poor design quality of existing camping apps. The app is part of Moss & Fog Media.

## Links

- Website: https://campgrounder.io
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/campgrounder/id6781063754
- QR landing page: https://campgrounder.io/clips
